title: Add core MCP tool invocation contract tests
description: Current: integration tests do not execute core MCP handlers end-to-end with a shared contract assertion. Expected: matrix-driven tests invoke core tool handlers and verify consistent MCP response contract shape (content array, serializable payload, no unexpected error flag).
acceptance_criteria: Core-tool matrix entries are invoked through registered handlers in tests
Each invocation asserts MCP contract shape with shared helper assertions
Failing contract cases produce actionable assertion messages per tool name
